column1: #   Lide2005          — CRC Handbook of Chemistry & Physics
#   Estimate          — Extrapolated from periodic trends; uncertainty ~25-40%
# This CSV is the one-time "teacher" for the alpha model.
# The shipped runtime code does NOT read this file — it uses fitted parameters.
#   weight  — fitting weight (higher = more important to match)
# Schwerdtfeger & Nagle 2019 Tab.II relativistic DHF/MP2 values.
# Lr-Rg have estimated half-lives of seconds to hours.
# Strong relativistic effects dominate; all values from 4-component DFT.
